The work shall be performed in accordance with all Sections of this Performance Work Statement
(PWS).

The General Services Administration’s (GSA) operating costs associated with the management and
administration of this contract are recovered through a CAF. This TO shall have a separate Contract
Line Item Number (CLIN) to cover this access fee, and this CAF shall be obligated at TO Award
(TOA).

This Task Order (TO) is a combination of Firm-Fixed-Price (FFP) and Time-and-Materials (T&M)
performance-based, severable, commercial type task order issued in accordance with FAR Part 16.5. T&M is defined under FAR 16.6, T&M. This TO also includes Direct Reimbursable Not-to-Exceed
(NTE) Contract Line Item Numbers (CLINs) for Other Direct Costs (ODCs) and Travel.

The Contractor shall provide a single rate for each labor category which will be charged no matter if
the prime Contractor or a subcontractor is to perform the work. This T&M task order will be an
incrementally funded award.

The contractor shall perform the effort required by this TO on a hybrid FFP + T&M basis for:

The contractor shall perform the effort required by this TO on an NTE basis for:
SECTION B – SUPPLIES OR SERVICES AND PRICES

Labor is anticipated to be awarded as a T&M Labor CLIN for the base year. At the end of each contract
period GSA will review the burn rates of each labor category (LCAT) to determine if there are LCATs
that are consistently burned that can be put into a firm fixed price (FFP) Labo r CLIN. If labor is
moved from the T&M CLIN to the FFP CLIN, a new proposed pricing proposal will be negotiated
between the Contractor and the Government prior to any change.

ODCs, priced across all CLINs, are to be determined (TBD) for each Period of Performance (PoP).

Long-distance travel is defined as travel over fifty (50) miles from any contractor on-site location. Local travel will not be reimbursed.
